source:
import React, { useContext } from 'react'; import { AuthContext } from '../context/AuthContext.jsx'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const DashboardPage = () => { const { user, role, name } = useContext(AuthContext); const StatPanel = ({ title, value, icon, color }) => (

{title}

{value}

{icon}
); return (

Welcome, {name || user.split('@')[0]}!

{role} Dashboard View

System Online • Server Syncing
{role === 'student' && ( <> )} {role === 'faculty' && ( <> )} {role === 'admin' && ( <> )}

Quick Actions

Take Quiz Join Live Class {role === 'admin' && ( Manage Users )}

Recent Activity

  • • System Backup Completed Successfully 2 mins ago
  • • {role === 'student' ? 'Grade Updated: Data Structures' : 'New User Registration Sync'} 1 hour ago
  • • Live Class scheduled for tomorrow 5 hours ago
); }; export default DashboardPage;

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'handleSubmitQuiz'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [timeLeft, selectedQuiz, handleSubmitQuiz]
